title: paeonia corallina var. flavescens
intro: Paeonia corallina var. flavescens, also known as yellow peony or yellow tree peony, is a deciduous shrub in the peony genus, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paeonia corallina var. flavescens include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer a range of therapeutic benefits.
